sentences.arabic: الصَّقَرُ طَائِرٌ مَشْهُورٌ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الخَلِيجِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Soko je poznata ptica u kulturi Zaljeva.
sentences.translationEn: The falcon is a well-known bird in Gulf culture.

sentences.translation: Neki muškarci uzgajaju sokolove kao hobi.
sentences.translationEn: Some men raise falcons as a hobby.
The falcon learns to fly and hunt.

sentences.translation: Sokolari je priznatа kulturna baština čovječanstva.
sentences.translationEn: Falconry is a recognized human heritage.
